name: Tadalafil Treatment in Patients With Cerebral Small Vessel Disease: The ETLAS-2 Randomized Clinical Trial.
summary: Phase II randomized placebo-controlled ETLAS-2 trial testing daily tadalafil 20 mg for 3 months in patients with cerebral small vessel disease and previous stroke or transient ischemic attack, reporting feasibility, cognition, imaging, blood pressure, and adverse events.

access_attempts.result: PubMed abstract and PMC full-text links available.
access_attempts.notes: Used PubMed abstract and metadata for staged extraction.
